Name: sapdme_timetracking_odata
Title: Time Tracking
ShortText: Manage time tracking records and events for activities on the shop floor.
Description: Improve transparency on your shop floor by recording and tracking attendance, labor, and production. Use the time tracking service to manage time tracking records and accurately record attendance, direct and indirect labor as well as production time and resource usage.
ChangeLog: [{"date":"10 Jan 2025","notes":"Add API for fetching activities for indirect labor and resource usage for a specific plant.","state":"Active","version":"v1"}]
